user_reported_bug: Should i deploy? I can't see it in the preview — the Kombo option (historical position check tool) is missing from the UI
summary: No relevant testing skill found. Verified the preview URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL end-to-end: after unlocking VIP with promo code 93928 and opening Multiple Tickets, the Kombo — Check History panel is visible, expands, switches locked/free modes, calls the correct backend APIs, returns positive historical match counts, clears correctly, shows the virgin badge after generation, and renders 6 Swiss / 5 Euro wheels. No deploy is needed for preview.
action_items: Optional UX note: the Kombo panel is not mounted immediately after VIP unlock while the Multiple Tickets section is collapsed; users must open Multiple Tickets to see the fuchsia Kombo toggle. Consider surfacing the Kombo toggle outside the collapsed section if the DJ expects it to be immediately visible.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirmed /api/kombo/virgin/{mode}, /api/kombo/position/{mode}, and frontend data-testid selectors are present. Backend direct checks returned /api/kombo/position/swiss?p1=13 match_count=29 and /api/history-echo/swiss?nums=14 match_count=231.
Non-blocking console noise observed during synthetic wheel events: 'Unable to preventDefault inside passive event listener invocation'; it did not block user-visible Kombo behavior.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing historical draw data and one VIP promo-code redemption for a fresh localStorage visitor id.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use preview URL https://rolling-lottery-math.preview.emergentagent.com. Fresh session: localStorage.clear(), unlock VIP via promo 93928, open Multiple Tickets, then Kombo panel is inside that expanded section above Generate. Verified locked p1=13 => 29 matches, free nums=14 => 231 matches, virgin badge after Generate, Euro shows 5 wheels/no P6.
rca_of_the_issue: The Kombo code is present and working in preview. The likely user confusion is that the panel is gated by VIP and located inside the collapsible Multiple Tickets section; it is not visible before VIP unlock or while that section is collapsed.
